description: Dark and humorous video essays analyzing Family Guy characters, storylines, and moments. Commentary-style content with animated clips.
assetsIncluded: Contractors (3-4 video editors, thumbnail artist, VO artist)
In-Depth Channel Analysis and Topic Idea Docs

sellerQandA.employees: No full-time employees. Just contractors. 3-4 video editors (Pakistan, Eastern Europe, Thailand), thumbnail artist on Fiverr, VO artist.
sellerQandA.dailyWork: Uses AI (Claude CoWork) to write scripts with custom prompts. Picks video title from AI-generated topic list. Sends script to VO artist, reviews narration. Sends to video editor, orders thumbnail on Fiverr. Reviews video edit, uploads and schedules. Reviews analytics. 4-6 hours/week total.
sellerQandA.whySelling: Co-founded a startup that received pre-seed funding. Selling multiple online assets to free up time for the startup.
sellerQandA.growthOpportunities: Channel punches above its weight in views vs subscribers. Multiple videos over 1M views, one over 3M. Main growth lever: sponsorships - could 3-4x per-video revenue. Some inbound sponsor interest but none pursued yet.
sellerQandA.training: Yes, absolutely. Will share entire process and ensure buyer is comfortable during and post-transition.
sellerQandA.penalties: Never. No penalties and no copyright strikes in the channel's history.

contentAnalysis.thumbnailQuality: Professional, consistent style with bold text overlays

recentPerformance.topRecent: Why Everyone HATES Brian Griffin Now - 244K views (1 month ago)

productionWorkflow.step1: Pick video title from AI-generated topic list (channel analysis)
productionWorkflow.step2: Use Claude CoWork with custom prompt to research and write script
productionWorkflow.step3: Grab scene clips and add links to script for editors
productionWorkflow.step6: Send script + narration to video editor
productionWorkflow.step8: Review video edit, request changes or approve

risks: Only 16 months old — limited track record
Family Guy commentary niche — could saturate or face content changes
Seller is selling multiple assets — might start competing channels
opportunities: Sponsorships: seller says 3-4x per-video revenue possible but never pursued
Expand to other animated shows (Simpsons, South Park, American Dad)
Increase upload frequency to accelerate growth
Add affiliate links in video descriptions
